mapper.sql: SELECT r.id, r.isbn, r.book_name, r.user_id, u.nickname, u.username, u.avatar, r.status, r.pickup_deadline, r.create_time FROM lib_reservation r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.user_id = r.user_id
SELECT r.id, r.isbn, b.cover, r.book_name, r.status, r.pickup_deadline, r.create_time FROM lib_reservation r LEFT JOIN lib_book b ON b.isbn = r.isbn

if.test: queryParams.field != null and queryParams.field != '' and queryParams.keyword != null and queryParams.keyword != ''

choose.when: AND (u.username LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryParams.keyword},'%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryParams.keyword},'%'))

mapper.select: WHERE r.isbn = #{isbn} AND r.status IN (0, 1) ORDER BY r.create_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lib_reservation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status IN (0, 1)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lib_reservation WHERE isbn = #{isbn} AND status IN (0, 1)
SELECT * FROM lib_reservation WHERE isbn = #{isbn} AND status = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM lib_reservation WHERE status = 1 AND pickup_deadline < NOW()
